---
title: "PEIYANG SONG"
---

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
# 🧑‍🚀 Space Crew: PEIYANG SONG

**Faculty:** \[ICDI\] *(Notice: Student ID strictly hidden)*
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::::::: columns
::: {.column width="48%" data-aos="fade-right"}
### 📸 Solo at NARIT (1pt)

![](images/clipboard-3627844710.png){.rounded}
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

:::: {.column width="48%" data-aos="fade-left"}
### 🎥 Personal Vlog (1pt)

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 style="border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden;"}
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/j6-jVFeBAME" title="NARIT Highlights" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen>

</iframe>
:::
::::
:::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
### 💭 Personal Impressions (1pt)
At the planetarium, I learned about
humanity's exploration of the mysteries of the universe and
the rapid development of modern space technology.


### 💡 Knowledge Gained (1pt)
I have learned about the universe, which has
enabled me to clearly understand the positions and names
of each constellation. I believe this extracurricular activity
has had a significant impact on me, making me curious
about the universe and helping me realize its rich and
diverse nature.

### 🚀 Future Applications (1pt)
Keep me updated on news reports about space
exploration. Humans can rely on high technology to
constantly explore new things, which has a great
promoting effect on our own and social development.
:::
